Nonduality is a mystical state achieved in some practices

It typically occurs in two distinct forms. Nonduality of [[Mithra-Varuna]] and nonduality of [[Alpha-Omega]].

== Mithra-Varuna ==

* [[Enlensing]]

== Alpha-Omega ==

* [[Olalo]]
* [[Resurrection of the Dead]]
* [[Narrative nonduality]]

== Both ==

* [[Cross of Omnipresence]]

==Vervaeke==

Non-duality is the state of optimally flowing between scaling up and down that leads to a comprehensive capacity for insight. Not insight into some specific problem but into the fundamental grammar of the [[Agent-Arena relationship|agent-arena relationship]]. Non-duality allows you to get an insight into your existential modes of being.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Non-Duality - Awakening from the Meaning Crisis|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210307150331/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/non-duality|website=[[awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]|date=2021-03-07|access-date=2022-11-10}}</ref>
 
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Nonduality]]==See Also==

*[[mysticism]]

[[Category:Mysticism]]
[[Category:Nonduality]]
[[sn:Nonduality]]==References==
[[Category:Pages]]
